nasb.text: Then the channels of the sea appeared, The foundations of the world were laid bare By the rebuke of the Lord, At the blast of the breath of His nostrils.

esv.text: Then the channels of the sea were seen; the foundations of the world were laid bare, at the rebuke of the Lord, at the blast of the breath of his nostrils.

cnv.text: 耶和華的斥責一發， 他鼻孔的氣一出， 海底就出現， 大地的根基也顯露。

ccb.text: 耶和华斥责一声， 祂的鼻孔一吹气， 海底就显现， 大地也露出根基。
